title.en: China-to-Ecuador Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入厄瓜多尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入厄瓜多：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Ecuador INEN conformity requirements, ARCERNNR grid-connection and microgeneración (net-metering) regulations, CNEL/distribution-company connection conditions, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, and the critical 60 Hz / 120/240 V split-phase grid difference — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines validated for 50 Hz / 220-380 V.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与厄瓜多尔INEN合格评定要求、ARCERNNR并网及微型发电（净电量计量）法规、CNEL/配电公司接入条件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC——以及关键的60 Hz / 120/240 V分相低压电网差异——对比经50 Hz / 220-380 V验证的中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與厄瓜多INEN合格評定要求、ARCERNNR併網及微型發電（淨電量計量）法規、CNEL/配電公司接入條件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC——以及關鍵的60 Hz / 120/240 V分相低壓電網差異——對比經50 Hz / 220-380 V驗證的中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INEN conformity scope determination, ARCERNNR grid-connection approval, CNEL or distribution-company equipment eligibility decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Ecuador INEN Technical Regulations (RTE INEN), ARCERNNR microgeneración and grid-connection regulations, distribution-company connection technical requirements, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INEN合格评定范围裁定、ARCERNNR并网批准、CNEL或配电公司设备资格决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行厄瓜多尔INEN技术法规（RTE INEN）、ARCERNNR微型发电及并网法规、配电公司接入技术要求及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INEN合格評定範圍裁定、ARCERNNR併網批准、CNEL或配電公司設備資格決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行厄瓜多INEN技術法規（RTE INEN）、ARCERNNR微型發電及併網法規、配電公司接入技術要求及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Ecuador, the key practical gaps are: (1) a fundamental grid incompatibility — Ecuador's distribution grid operates at 60 Hz and 120/240 V split-phase (LV), whereas Chinese inverters are validated for 50 Hz and 220/380 V; firmware grid-protection settings, anti-islanding thresholds, and reconnection parameters must be fully reconfigured and retested for Ecuador's grid; (2) INEN conformity — NTE INEN technical standards and RTE INEN technical regulations require a certificate of conformity before market entry; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence as required for ARCERNNR and distribution-company grid connection; (4) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance validated at 60 Hz; (5) IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence. China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines are 50 Hz-based and do not satisfy Ecuador INEN/ARCERNNR requirements; the 60 Hz frequency difference is a genuine engineering reconfiguration gate, not a paperwork gap.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口厄瓜多尔时，主要实际差距包括：（1）根本性电网不兼容——厄瓜多尔配电网运行于60 Hz、120/240 V分相低压，而中国逆变器经50 Hz、220/380 V验证；逆变器固件的电网保护设置、防孤岛阈值和重连参数须针对厄瓜多尔电网完全重新配置并重新测试；（2）INEN合格评定——NTE INEN技术标准和RTE INEN技术法规要求市场准入前取得合格证书；（3）ARCERNNR及配电公司并网接入所需的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（4）在60 Hz下验证的IEC 62116防孤岛合规；（5）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据。中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准基于50 Hz，不满足厄瓜多尔INEN/ARCERNNR要求；60 Hz频率差异是真实的工程重新配置门槛，而非单纯的文件差距。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口厄瓜多時，主要實際差距包括：（1）根本性電網不相容——厄瓜多配電網運行於60 Hz、120/240 V分相低壓，而中國逆變器經50 Hz、220/380 V驗證；逆變器韌體的電網保護設置、防孤島閾值和重連參數須針對厄瓜多電網完全重新配置並重新測試；（2）INEN合格評定——NTE INEN技術標準和RTE INEN技術法規要求市場准入前取得合格證書；（3）ARCERNNR及配電公司併網接入所需的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（4）在60 Hz下驗證的IEC 62116防孤島合規；（5）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據。中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準基於50 Hz，不滿足厄瓜多INEN/ARCERNNR要求；60 Hz頻率差異是真實的工程重新配置門檻，而非單純的文件差距。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
